raw: Children 6 and under are admitted free. This pass admits 2 adults at a discounted rate of $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children 7-17 at $10 per person (special exhibition) . There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10. This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation. Follow the instructions in the email.

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children 6 and under are admitted free
